title: Bob's Rubys For All
description: Did you ever want Redstone to have other uses besides Redstone builds? Well if you answered no, you're lying to yourself. This mod adds rubies to the game. you can also add ores to the middle of the ruby to make it worth more. You can use this as currency
body:
In this mod you can craft rubys. You can do this by useing a blast furnace to melt redstone. The mod is for fabric, and will NOT be comeing to forge. 

- Start by geting redstone and useing a blast furnace to melt it into ruby dust.![redstone to ruby dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9431a89f94156c8a7cc99f4bec14b9ea1232d373.png)

- When you have 4 ruby dust you can craft a raw ruby. this rubby will be in its uncut form, and will have to be refined down.
 
  ![ruby dust to raw ruby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28a3b65cca0d2e332fbdbb00996f2c84c8f5ecb.png)

- Using a stone cutter you can cut the raw ruby into a raw-cut-ruby. this ruby will still have to be refined.

  ![raw ruby to raw cut ruby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/258b44aef4b5a4fb4d2ac893697552fd35cf13a6.png)

- You now have your first "Ruby" if you want to do more with your ruby you will have to smelt it useing the blast furnace. This will get you a smelted ruby.
  
  ![raw to smelted ruby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0416e3267e7e6e0b9d5e4196b2093c031f8a271.png)

  -Now you have a full ruby, you can add gems and ores like diamonds and Iron to your Ruby to make it look better. If you are useing this as a currency you can use different types of Ruby-Ores as different coins. The crafting is shapless for all that is listed.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fa3d8729993db17230da2796c4a9fbb3e68072f.png)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb549406e53254dcc2999036e95efeed0ca3a02.png)![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/021f38f95515d0e3a96935e65fbe64efe38b60a3.png)![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a1907484a908006f53148aab6bbcc50e0aaf25d.png)![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08909916d3f4ba110f2d27197fe8cf403f56fb2.png)  ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8de8de8d9f401900e3c0e810870c3a66e27393a.png)
